data.title: Update brainstorm SKILL.md — no-args epic selection + gap analysis one-at-a-time fix
data.description:
## Summary
Update brainstorm SKILL.md with two changes: (a) When invoked with no arguments, show a selectable list of open/unblocked epics with 0 children via sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0, plus a "start fresh" option. Show count of >0-child epics below the list. When no 0-child epics exist, automatically fall through to fresh dialogue. (b) Fix Phase 1 Gate Step 2 gap analysis to ask one question at a time instead of batching up to 3.

## TDD Exemption
Static assets only (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation, no executable conditional logic). Behavioral regression covered by skill eval suite (run-skill-evals.sh); SC7 defines post-delivery dogfooding.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No-args path calls sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] "start fresh" option described in no-args path
  Verify: grep -qi 'start fresh' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Fallthrough to fresh dialogue when no 0-child epics
  Verify: grep -qi 'fall.*through\|automatically.*fresh' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Count of >0-child epics displayed below the no-args epic list
  Verify: grep -A5 'max-children=0' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'epics.*with.*children\|child.*count'
- [ ] Old batched gap analysis phrase removed (tombstone)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'at most 3 targeted questions' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] New one-at-a-time gap analysis instruction present
  Verify: grep -qi 'one question at a time\|one.*at.*a.*time' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
